headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Mosaic, Lowers Price Target to $26
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Nigel Dally   maintains Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $28 to $26.
